svg.title: Complete wiring diagram for the battle bot, corrected for the ESC's actual connectors
svg.desc: Battery powers the DRV8833 and the ESC's 2-pin battery input directly. The ESC's 3-pin connector carries signal, 5V BEC, and ground to the ESP32-S3, which also sends control signals to the DRV8833. The DRV8833 drives the two N20 motors and the ESC drives the 1806 weapon motor.
